gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; career counselors also remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, all situated among dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; furthermore, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
